svg.title: So do table diagram tu SQL
svg.desc: Diagram chi gom cac table va cot doc tu schema_gia_su_complete.sql. Khong phai ERD, khong co quan he, khong them doi tuong ngoai table.
svg.text: TABLE DIAGRAM TU SQL - KHONG PHAI ERD
So do cac table trong schema
Nguon: schema_gia_su_complete.sql | 19 table | Chi hien thi table va cot dung theo CREATE TABLE.
